answer_en:
Lateral Pterygoid m.
Origin: Infratemporal surface and infratemporal crest of greater wing of sphenoid bone (superior head); lateral surface of lateral pterygoid plate of sphenoid bone (inferior head)
Insertion: Joint capsule and articular disc of TMJ (superior head); pterygoid fovea on neck of mandible (inferior head)

details: Origin: Infratemporal surface and infratemporal crest of greater wing of sphenoid bone (superior head); lateral surface of lateral pterygoid plate of sphenoid bone (inferior head)
